description: This file defines a REST controller for system-related endpoints in a Spring Boot application. It includes endpoints for health check, API documentation redirection, welcome message, and application info.

classes.name: SystemController
classes.description: Spring REST controller providing basic system endpoints like health check, documentation redirect, welcome message, and application info.

methods.name: hello
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/' and returns a welcome message indicating the API is running.

methods.name: docs
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/docs' and redirects clients to the Swagger UI page, preserving reverse-proxy path and scheme.

methods.name: health
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/health' and returns 'OK' to indicate service health.

methods.name: info
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/api/info' and returns application information string.
